occurrence_sentence: “Quantum science and engineering is the future of communications, computation and cryptography,” said Jeff Zaleski, IU Bloomington's interim vice provost for research. “Indiana University's intellectual expertise in quantum science truly puts the university at the forefront of this developing field, and we are eager to drive the leading edge of research in this area.”
